evidence.note: support_preserving_active=0 is expected when stratified-elites delivers diversity without the injection path (per V3-EXQ-567 notes); candidate population is genuinely diverse
world_states[1] fix correctly in place; probe candidate_features non-degenerate
first-action categorical diversity is strong but compressed to 0.22% of z_world magnitude by E2 world-forward before reaching the z_world-only ARC-062 head

root_cause: ARC-062 GatedPolicy head reads z_world-derived features (R1 multi-stream z_world/z_self/z_harm_a); SP-CEM/stratified delivers ~5 distinct first-action classes but E2 world-forward compresses that categorical diversity to ~0.22% of the z_world signal magnitude, so the head cannot produce context-conditional behavioural divergence. Substrate is sound but under-fed: the head input contract, not the CEM substrate, is the bottleneck.
contributory_note: First 543-lineage run with the candidate-distinguishability confound provably absent (world_states[1] L2 0.013 vs 543b 1e-5; 4.95 unique first-action classes). Persistent inert-gating with the confound removed cleanly isolates the head input contract. non_contributory direction left as-is; contributory weight captured by this autopsy + plan-doc routing, not by manifest relabelling.

routing.then: re-issue falsifier as V3-EXQ-543f via /queue-experiment (543d 2x2 factorial + SP-CEM unchanged; only head input contract changes; supersedes V3-EXQ-543e)
routing.gap_c_gap_d: remain open, sequenced after a contributory falsifier PASS
routing.not_recommended: ARC-062 substrate-rationale retirement (substrate is under-fed, not redundant)
